title: Master Claude Code with Claude Fable 5 (57 mins)
summary: Keith AI's 57-minute video demonstrates advanced use of Claude Code as a coding system rather than a chat interface. The video covers Desktop, CLI, and web modes, permissions, connectors, slash commands, plugins, routines, sub-agents, and dynamic workflows for building apps and automating development workflows.
writeup: Keith AI's 57-minute walkthrough treats Claude Code as a coding system instead of a chat interface, covering its Desktop, CLI, and web modes. It works through permissions, connectors, slash commands, plugins, routines, sub-agents, and dynamic workflows for building apps and automating development tasks. The framing matters because it shifts Claude Code from one-off prompting toward structured, agentic workflows. The concrete takeaways center on configuring access and tooling, then composing routines and sub-agents to delegate and route work across a development pipeline.
